chunks: Systems Engineering Process: requirements analysis, functional decomposition, design synthesis, verification planning.
Structural load analysis must account for static, dynamic, and thermal load cases.
The preliminary design review (PDR) establishes the allocated baseline for system architecture.
Configuration management: all changes to baseline documents must use the Engineering Change Proposal (ECP) system.
QA inspection requirements for safety-critical components are defined in QA-PROC-001.

query: What are the overtime approval requirements for exempt employees?
answer: Exempt employees are not entitled to overtime pay under the Fair Labor Standards Act. However, supervisors may approve additional compensation through the Flex-Time Compensation Program (Form HR-441) for work exceeding 50 hours per week. All requests must be submitted within 14 days of the pay period and approved by a department director or above.
